# Proxa Labs

> Proxa Labs is the AI implementation partner built for biopharma commercial learning — advisory, an AI platform, and structured experimentation. Methodology-first, compliance by design.

## Pages
- [Platform](https://www.proxalabs.com/platform): The closed-loop AI platform — Forge builds content, Cue delivers learning, Stage assesses readiness, Trace confirms competency.
- [Advisory](https://www.proxalabs.com/advisory): AI strategy, readiness assessments, governance, and infrastructure planning for biopharma commercial L&D.
- [AI Literacy](https://www.proxalabs.com/ai-literacy): Role-targeted AI fluency tracks for the commercial organization.
- [InsiteX LMS](https://www.proxalabs.com/insitex-lms): Enterprise learning management built for biopharma compliance.
- [Content Development](https://www.proxalabs.com/content-development): MLR-compliant content development, AI-powered or traditional.
- [The Lab](https://www.proxalabs.com/the-lab): Structured AI experimentation — define the use case, design the experiment, measure what matters.
- [About](https://www.proxalabs.com/about): 25 years of biopharma commercial learning expertise applied to AI implementation.
- [Blog](https://www.proxalabs.com/blog): Field notes and frameworks on commercial readiness and AI evidence.
- [Contact](https://www.proxalabs.com/contact): Start a conversation.
